title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in to their account. They've tried resetting their password multiple times but still haven't received the recovery email.

title: 2FA Authentication Failure
description: User is not receiving the 6-digit TOTP code on their registered mobile number for two-factor authentication.

title: Biometric Sync Error
description: FaceID recognition failing on the mobile app after the latest 2026 system update. Manual login also freezing.

title: Account Locked - Multiple Attempts
description: Account automatically locked due to 5 consecutive failed login attempts. User claims they are using the correct credentials.

title: SSO Integration Error
description: Corporate Single Sign-On (SSO) redirect loop detected. User is unable to bypass the landing page.

title: Forgot Username Recovery
description: Customer forgot their unique username. Successfully recovered via secondary email verification.

title: Session Hijacking Suspected
description: Unauthorized login attempt detected from an unknown IP in a different country. Account restricted for safety.

title: Social Login - API Timeout
description: Login with Google/Apple ID is timing out. Error code: 504 Gateway Timeout during authentication.

title: Database Sync Post-Login
description: User can log in, but the dashboard shows 'No Data Found' due to a database sync error after authentication.

title: Browser Compatibility Issue
description: Login button unresponsive on older versions of Safari. Advised user to update browser.

title: Expired Security Token
description: User is getting 'Token Expired' error immediately after a successful login. Forced logout occurring repeatedly.

title: Captcha Loop Issue
description: User is stuck in an infinite Captcha loop during the login process, even after providing correct answers.
